generate.title: Prepare for exam
generate.subtitle: A timed mock exam sampled from this course's own quiz questions, weighted toward what you're weakest on.
generate.notEnoughQuestions: This course doesn't have enough quiz questions yet for a mock exam.
generate.rateLimited: You've generated a few exams recently — try again later.

runner.question: Question {{current}} of {{total}}
runner.submitConfirmBody: You've answered {{answered}} of {{total}} questions. You can't change your answers after submitting.
runner.expiredWarning: Time's up — submit now before the grace period ends.

report.title: Exam results
report.expiredNotice: This attempt was submitted after the time limit and was marked expired.

report.passedNote: Nice work — you've earned the Exam Ready badge.
report.notPassedNote: Keep reviewing your weak spots — 80% unlocks the Exam Ready badge.
